meta.title: DEF CON 30 - Richard Thieme - UFOs, Alien Life, and the Least Untruthful Things I Can Say
meta.description: I have explored the subject of UFOs seriously and in depth and detail for 44 years. I have worked with some of the best and brightest in the "invisible college" to do academic research and reach conclusions based on the evidence. I contributed to the celebrated history, "UFOs and Government: A Historical Inquiry," the gold standard for historical research into the subject now in over 100 university libraries. This talk more than updates the latest government statements on the subject--it is the most complete, honest, and forthright presentation I can make. I will tell the most truth I can, based on data and evidence. As an NSA analyst told me, "Richard, they are here. They're here."
